scripts.dev: sh -c 'cd humanizer-engine/frontend && if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then npm install; fi && npm run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000'
scripts.build: sh -c 'cd humanizer-engine/frontend && if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then npm install; fi && npm run build && rm -rf ../../dist && mkdir -p ../../dist && cp -R .next/static ../../dist/static && cp -R public ../../dist/public'
